prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `81c0276b`.
codex_response:
Implemented `81c0276b` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: detect the separator-color lattice, ignore that separator color and the black background, count how many 2x2 cell-blocks each remaining color occupies, then emit a left-packed histogram ordered from smallest count to largest count. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting hypothesis because it matched all official examples; no correction note was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples passed, `1000/1000` generated examples passed, the shared build produced the required artifacts, and `preview_01.png` visually matches the official family. No new primitive was needed.

Task package files:
- [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_81c0276b/__init__.py)
- [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_81c0276b/verifier.py)
- [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_81c0276b/generator.py)

Artifacts:
- [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/81c0276b/task.json)
- [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/81c0276b/previews/originals.png)
- [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/81c0276b/previews/preview_01.png)
- [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/81c0276b/previews/preview_02.png)
- [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/81c0276b/previews/preview_03.png)

The generator matches the task family by rendering the same frontier lattice, fixed centered 2x2 cell-blocks, 3x3 to 4x4 layouts, divider-colored filler cells, and distinct non-divider frequencies that map directly to the sorted histogram output.
